'''鈭歝h-w-m''' ('''chawama''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wage|wage]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-w-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wage|wage]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歝h-w-m
|-
! Lemma
| chawama
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chawamithi|chawamithi]] || [[word:chawamiji|chawamiji]] || [[word:chawamishi|chawamishi]] || [[word:chawami|chawami]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chawamuthuth|chawamuthuth]] || [[word:chawamujuj|chawamujuj]] || [[word:chawamushush|chawamushush]] || [[word:chawam|chawam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chawamuthu|chawamuthu]] || [[word:chawamuju|chawamuju]] || [[word:chawamushu|chawamushu]] || [[word:chawamu|chawamu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chawamufuth|chawamufuth]] || [[word:chawamufuj|chawamufuj]] || [[word:chawamufush|chawamufush]] || [[word:chawamuf|chawamuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chawamethe|chawamethe]] || [[word:chawameje|chawameje]] || [[word:chawameshe|chawameshe]] || [[word:chawame|chawame]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chawamothoth|chawamothoth]] || [[word:chawamojoj|chawamojoj]] || [[word:chawamoshosh|chawamoshosh]] || [[word:chawam|chawam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chawamotho|chawamotho]] || [[word:chawamojo|chawamojo]] || [[word:chawamosho|chawamosho]] || [[word:chawamo|chawamo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chawamofoth|chawamofoth]] || [[word:chawamofoj|chawamofoj]] || [[word:chawamofosh|chawamofosh]] || [[word:chawamof|chawamof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chawam忙th忙|chawam忙th忙]] || [[word:chawam忙j忙|chawam忙j忙]] || [[word:chawam忙sh忙|chawam忙sh忙]] || [[word:chawam忙|chawam忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chawamathath|chawamathath]] || [[word:chawamajaj|chawamajaj]] || [[word:chawamashash|chawamashash]] || [[word:chawam|chawam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chawamatha|chawamatha]] || [[word:chawamaja|chawamaja]] || [[word:chawamasha|chawamasha]] || [[word:chawama|chawama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chawamafath|chawamafath]] || [[word:chawamafaj|chawamafaj]] || [[word:chawamafash|chawamafash]] || [[word:chawamaf|chawamaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:chawamasha|chawamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gochawamasha|gochawamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokichawamasha|gokichawamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:chawamn眉sha|chawamn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gochawamnkn眉sha|gochawamnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokichawamn眉sha|gokichawamn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chawamsh毛sha|chawamsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochawamnksh毛sha|gochawamnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichawamsh毛sha|gokichawamsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chawamrosha|chawamrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochawamnkrosha|gochawamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokichawamrosha|gokichawamrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chawamusha|chawamusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gochawamnkmusha|gochawamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichawamusha|gokichawamusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:chawamsherasha|chawamsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gochawamnksherasha|gochawamnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokichawamsherasha|gokichawamsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:chawamngasha|chawamngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gochawamnkngasha|gochawamnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokichawamngasha|gokichawamngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chawamyasha|chawamyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gochawamnkyasha|gochawamnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokichawamyasha|gokichawamyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:chawamyamasha|chawamyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gochawamnkyamasha|gochawamnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokichawamyamasha|gokichawamyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:chawamn眉sh毛sha|chawamn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gochawamnkn眉sh毛sha|gochawamnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokichawamn眉sh毛sha|gokichawamn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:chawamn眉rosha|chawamn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochawamnkn眉rosha|gochawamnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokichawamn眉rosha|gokichawamn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chawamn眉musha|chawamn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochawamnkn眉musha|gochawamnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichawamn眉musha|gokichawamn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:chawamsh毛n眉sha|chawamsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gochawamnksh毛n眉sha|gochawamnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokichawamsh毛n眉sha|gokichawamsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:chawamsh毛rosha|chawamsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochawamnksh毛rosha|gochawamnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokichawamsh毛rosha|gokichawamsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chawamsh毛musha|chawamsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochawamnksh毛musha|gochawamnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichawamsh毛musha|gokichawamsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:chawamron眉sha|chawamron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gochawamnkron眉sha|gochawamnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokichawamron眉sha|gokichawamron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:chawamrosh毛sha|chawamrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gochawamnkrosh毛sha|gochawamnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokichawamrosh毛sha|gokichawamrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chawamromusha|chawamromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochawamnkromusha|gochawamnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichawamromusha|gokichawamromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:chawamun眉sha|chawamun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gochawamnkmun眉sha|gochawamnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokichawamun眉sha|gokichawamun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:chawamush毛sha|chawamush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gochawamnkmush毛sha|gochawamnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokichawamush毛sha|gokichawamush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:chawamurosha|chawamurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochawamnkmurosha|gochawamnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokichawamurosha|gokichawamurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:chawam|chawam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ch忙w忙m|ch忙w忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hochawam|hochawam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoch忙w忙m|hoch忙w忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohochawam|hohochawam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoch忙w忙m|hohoch忙w忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉chawam|n眉chawam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉ch忙w忙m|n眉ch忙w忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉chawam|n眉n眉chawam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉ch忙w忙m|n眉n眉ch忙w忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂chawam|n茂chawam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂ch忙w忙m|n茂ch忙w忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂chawam|n茂n茂chawam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂ch忙w忙m|n茂n茂ch忙w忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luchawam|luchawam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luch忙w忙m|luch忙w忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluchawam|luluchawam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluch忙w忙m|luluch忙w忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lichawam|lichawam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lich忙w忙m|lich忙w忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilichawam|lilichawam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilich忙w忙m|lilich忙w忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kochawam|kochawam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koch忙w忙m|koch忙w忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokochawam|kokochawam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoch忙w忙m|kokoch忙w忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kechawam|kechawam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kech忙w忙m|kech忙w忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekechawam|kekechawam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekech忙w忙m|kekech忙w忙m]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
